step_rationale: Shared ischemic stroke and MI biomarker; acute-phase immune response marker.
mechanism: Orosomucoid-1 is a systemic acute-phase protein and immune-response marker elevated in ischemic MI, not plaque-mechanism-specific.

references.title: Identification of key proteins and pathways in myocardial infarction using machine learning approaches.
Identification of core genes shared by ischemic stroke and myocardial infarction using an integrated approach.
Quantitative proteomics for cardiac biomarker discovery using isoproterenol-treated nonhuman primates.
